children.heading: .—Waiver of Cost Sharing Requirement
children.label: a .—Waiver of Cost Sharing Requirement
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation may use amounts appropriated under to carry out the purposes of this subchapter.section 24909(a)(2)(A) of title 49

children.heading: .—Ban on Using Amounts for Heliport
children.label: b .—Ban on Using Amounts for Heliport
children.text: Amounts appropriated under may not be used for design, construction, or operation of a heliport at or near Union Station.section 24909 of title 49
